text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>Bey Herrn Johannes Christ seel. Frau Wittib ist zu haben: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Johann Arnds</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Paßions- und Oster-Predigten</TITLE>, <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT> à <PRIZE>fl. 2.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Predigten von denen Egyptischen Plagen</TITLE>, <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT> à <PRIZE>24. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Stahiii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Fundamenta Chymiae dogmat. rat. & experim.</TITLE> <VOLUME>Pars II.</VOLUME>, <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>fl. 1. 30. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Poetevin</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Nouvelie Grammaire Francoise & Allemande</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT> à <PRIZE>32. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Maiers der Geistl.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Krancken Geistl. oder Seelen-Cur.</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT> à <PRIZE>48. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Hauß-Gebett-Buch, mit grober Schrifft</TITLE>, <VOLUME>2. Theile</VOLUME>, <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT> à <PRIZE>40. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":3,"explanation":"Three corrections were made: 1) In the third BIBL entry, the closing tag was `</PRIZE>` but the opening tag was `<PRICE>` (mismatched tags). Changed `<PRICE>` to `<PRIZE>` to match the closing tag and be consistent with all other entries. 2) The `&` characters in \"rat. & experim.\" and \"Francoise & Allemande\" were unescaped XML ampersands — these were changed to `&` to produce valid XML. 3) Unicode escape sequences like `√ü` (√ü) and `√†` (√†) were normalized to their intended characters: `√ü` → `ß` (German Eszett, appearing in \"Paßions-\" and \"Hauß-\"), and `√†` → `à` (price indicator). These are transcription artifacts from the original source rather than XML structural errors, but were cleaned up for readability."}
